title: China's May shipments to U.S. clock 5-year high growth at 35% as overall exports jump on tech boost
summary_full: Exports to the U.S. surged the most since March 2021, extending a rebound following a long streak of double-digit declines for the most of last year.
summary_public: Exports to the U.S. surged the most since March 2021, extending a rebound following a long streak of double-digit declines for the most of last year.
